name: TestGetWaitPDUsTPIPv4DstAddr
title: TestGetWaitPDUsTPIPv4DstAddr
description: If a PDU was received via IPv4 that triggered the last wait function, with form 1 the IPv4 destination address can be requested.
Form 2 can only be used for joined events. The number of the joined event (return value of TestJoin...) is here being used as an index.

parameters.name: IPv4DestinationAddress
parameters.description: IPv4 destination address in network byte order.
